examples: He bellowed in a stentorian voice.
The stentorian tones of auctioneer, calling out to clear, now announced that the sale to commence.
The stentorian tones of auctioneer, calling out to clear , now announced that the sale to commence.
For all the shrill noise of his scrawled marginalia, Mr Twombly's tone can often be very grand and stentorian.
My poker-faced host recited the day's dishes in stentorian tones while looking out at the street, and I scrambled to understand.
